finding: Digital cards are shared through QR, email, text, WhatsApp, social media, copy link, NFC, wallet and AirDrop; recipients do not need an app.
relevance: Confirms landing page should offer direct action options, not only social links.
next_action: Prioritize WhatsApp/email/social actions in first screen.

finding: Strong digital card products emphasize brand colors, updatable contact details, unlimited links/social profiles/videos, and device-independent viewing.
relevance: Confirms why the QR should point to a controlled page that can evolve without reprinting.
next_action: Keep links in data arrays and design around the existing card brand.

finding: URL/link-in-bio QR is better when info may change; vCard is static. Business-card destination must be mobile-friendly.
relevance: Supports using a landing page URL instead of direct Instagram or static contact QR.
next_action: Keep QR destination as final deployed page URL.

finding: QR should use dark foreground on light background, strong contrast, and at least 4-module quiet zone; avoid busy backgrounds.
relevance: Confirms black-on-white QR even on a black/gold card.
next_action: Keep QR print instructions in README/QA.
